ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., Diversified Equity) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the fund */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was launched */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund */,
  "aum" REAL /* Assets Under Management (AUM) of the fund */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Annual expense ratio of the fund */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the fund */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the fund (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance period */,
  "period_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the performance period covers */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance period */,
  "cagr_return" REAL /* Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) return for the period */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Invested amount for the period */,
  "end_value" REAL /* End value of the investment for the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the fund for the period */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the fund for the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the fund for the period */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the fund for the period */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Benchmark return for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES performance_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment transaction */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "source_of_funds" TEXT /* Source of the investment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in fund management */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fund manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started managing the fund */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager stopped managing the fund (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_managers_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Equity, Debt) */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the fund's total assets */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Current value of the asset */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class (e.g., Equity, Debt, Real Estate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the asset composition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_assets_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark index */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of the benchmark (e.g., Equity, Debt) */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Current value of the benchmark index */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return of the benchmark index for the latest period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_benchmarks_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price */,
  "nav" REAL /* Net Asset Value (NAV) of the fund */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the fund */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the fund on that date */,
  "nav_change" REAL /* Change in NAV from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_historical_prices_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)
